cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Clair provides personalized AI tutoring and coding assistance for students and developers in resource-constrained environments, enabling offline access to educational support without requiring internet connectivity or expensive cloud APIs.

test_prompts.prompt: Write a Python function that calculates the factorial of a number using recursion, and explain how the base case prevents infinite recursion.
Debug this code: for i in range(5): print(i) if i % 2 == 0. Explain the syntax error and provide the corrected version.
